summary: Verified UnitSelect portal dropdown fix inside Edit Rough Estimate dialog on Marketing Board > RE Projects. Dropdown opens directly below trigger (4px gap), is fully interactive (option clicks work, selection reflects in button), multiple independent dropdowns on the same form work correctly. Minor issues: search input fill behavior inconsistent in automation, React hydration warnings (cosmetic).

issues: React hydration warning: <div> (DnD DragOverlay/SortableContext wrapper) cannot be a nested child of <tbody> in REProjectsPage.jsx line ~721 table. Functional but logs console errors.
React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in PlanningBoard render. Cosmetic but should be fixed.

action_items: (Optional) Replace nested <div> inside <tbody> with proper <tr> wrapping in REProjectsPage.jsx scope-items table to fix React hydration warning (DnD SortableContext wrapper).
(Optional) Add unique `key` prop on list iteration in PlanningBoard.jsx (likely the pending-requests list ~line 1200).
critical_code_review_comments: UnitSelect portal + fixed positioning + stopPropagation fix works correctly inside Radix Dialog. Dropdown is 4px below trigger, interactive, multiple instances work independently.
Scroll handler correctly closes dropdown on any ancestor scroll (capture phase).
Minor: DnD SortableContext wrapping <tr> elements places a <div> directly inside <tbody>, causing hydration warning. Consider using a SortableContext that renders as tbody or a fragment.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing approved RE USB-RE0009 (RE - Mrs. Abinaya).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Rough Estimate dialog access: Login as Super Admin via Demo Access > navigate to /crm/re-projects > click 'Approved' card > click 'Edit' on USB-RE0009 or USB-RE0001. Unit dropdown uses portal + fixed positioning with pointer-events:auto. Verified working with 9 Unit dropdowns in the form. Note: Planning role's RE Projects page is empty (no REs assigned).
verified_fixes: Portal dropdown opens directly below Unit trigger button (measured 4.0px gap)
Dropdown remains visible and clickable inside Radix Dialog (stopPropagation works)
Clicking unit option (e.g., Nos, Kg) updates the button label correctly
Multiple independent Unit dropdowns on the same form work without interference
Dialog contains Save button and Download PDF button

frontend: Login via Demo Access > Super Admin - PASS
Navigate to /crm/re-projects, click Approved card - PASS (2 REs shown)
Open Edit Rough Estimate dialog for USB-RE0009 - PASS
Click 'Add Item' 3x to add scope rows - PASS
Open UnitSelect dropdown - PASS (opens 4px below trigger)
Verify portal dropdown position matches button x/width - PASS
Click Nos option on row 1 - PASS (button shows 'Nos (Numbers)')
Open second Unit dropdown on row 2 and pick Kg - PASS (button shows 'Kg (Kilogram)')
Verify Save and Download PDF buttons exist - PASS

minor_observations: Playwright page.fill on the unit-search-input resulted in empty value after refocus, possibly due to the input being re-rendered. Manual user typing should work because the input has stopPropagation on portal. Not reproduced as a user-facing bug.
401 console error observed on one resource during dialog load (non-blocking).
